title: Open built-in function should be called with a valid mode
description: Ensures that built-in functions are called with a valid mode to avoid unexpected behavior.
message: Built-in function called with an invalid mode.
recommendation: Validate and set the mode before calling the function.

noncompliant.description: Calling open function with 'w' mode in a non-writable directory.

compliant.description: Calling open function with 'r' mode in a readable directory.

why_is_this_an_issue: Built-in functions with invalid modes can lead to unexpected behavior and potential security vulnerabilities.
how_to_fix: Ensure that the mode is correctly set before calling the function.

metadata.title: Open built-in function should be called with a valid mode
